titleStmt.title: SII 41.32: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 32. (A.R. No. 31 of 1905.) Tiṇḍivaṉam, Tindivanam Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: Gōpura of the Tinṭrinīśvara temple, left of entrance.

p.hi: Vijayanagara, Venkata II, Saka 1525 Panguni 2, śu 7, Monday, Mrigasirsha = 1603, March 9.

summary.p: This records the order of Bommu-nāyakkar, the agent of Nāgama-nāyakkarayyan, the Śrīkāryam officer of the Tiṇḍīśvra temple, the sthānamāhēśvaras (trustees), Palapaṭṭaḍai Śēḍar, the Śeṭṭis, peasants and other elders to the Kaikkōlamudalis residing at the maḍavilāgam of the temple to the effect that they should pay as vechcha-ilāḍam, kāṇikkai, and kaṭṭāyam, (1/2) paṇam per loom, per month and also do service in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīman mahā maṇdhaleśvaraveṅkaṭapatirāyar prativirājyampaṇṇi A
raḷāṉiṉṟa śakāptam10000 5 1000 2 100 10 5kku mel cellāṉiṉṟa copakiṟuti varuṣampaṅkuṉi mātam
2§ mṛgaśirṣa nakṣatramsaptamiyum peṟṟa comavārattuṉāḷ tiṇṭiśvaranko
yil stri(śrī) kāriyañ ceyyum nākamaṉāyakkarayyaṉ kāriyattukku kaṟttarāṉa pommu
ṉāyakkarum stāṉamāheśvararum palappaṭṭaṭai ceṭar ceṭṭiyarkaḷ maṟṟu
muṇṭāṉa kuṭiyāvarkaḷ periyorkaḷum tiṇṭiśvarar koyi
l maṭaviḷākam kaikoḷa mutalikaḷukku kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭi ṉāḷḷatu mutal ve
ccavilāṭam kāṇikkai kaṭṭāyam Uḷpaṭa mātam Oṉṟukku taṟi Oṉṟukku Araippaṇam
viḻukkāṭu koyilukku Iṟuttu koyil Ūḻiyamum ceytu koṇṭu cukattile
yirukkavum
Itukku yātāmoruvar Atikam paṇṇiṉa perkaḷ keṅkai karaiyile kāram
pacuvaik koṉṟa toṣattile poka kaṭavarākavum Ituvum taṅkaḷ tāyār toppaṉār
taṉṉuṭa kaiyālek koṉṟa toṣattile pokak kaṭavarākavum §
Digital edition of SII 41.32 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
